revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿二]][[zh:六月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿二]][[zh:六月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿二]][[zh:六月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月廿二]][[zh:六月廿二]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 22|qq=June 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kenmu (Han)|ja|建武 (漢)|lt=Kenmu (Han)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenmu (Han)|1=Jianwu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8012586}} 1st Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|AD 25|en|AD 25|qid=Q24560|lt=AD 25|1=AD 25}} {{ill|August 4|en|August 4|qid=Q2784|lt=August 4|1=August 4}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Guangwu of Han|en|Emperor Guangwu of Han|qid=Q7268|lt=Emperor Guangwu|1=Emperor Guangwu of Han}} ({{ill|Liu Xiu|ja|劉秀|lt=Liu Xiu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Liu Xiu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 光武帝|1=Emperor Guangwu of Han|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q7268}} ) restored the Han Dynasty ({{ill|Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|en|Han_dynasty#Eastern_Han|qid=Q7209|lt=Later Han|1=Han dynasty}}{{citation needed|lt=Later Han|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Later Han|qq=}} ). * {{ill|Genkyū|en|Genkyū|qid=Q1194276|lt=Genkyū|1=Genkyū}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1205|en|1205|qid=Q5229|lt=1205|1=1205}} {{ill|July 10|en|July 10|qid=Q2689|lt=July 10|1=July 10}} ) – {{ill|Hōjō Tokimasa|en|Hōjō Tokimasa|qid=Q589811|lt=Hōjō Tokimasa|1=Hōjō Tokimasa}} defeated the clan of {{ill|Hatakeyama Shigetada|en|Hatakeyama Shigetada|qid=Q3128268|lt=Hatakeyama Shigetada|1=Hatakeyama Shigetada}} in the regions of Musashi and Futamatagawa. * [[Ōei]]{{efn|July 1394 through April 1428|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 15th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1408|en|1408|qid=Q6138|lt=1408|1=1408}} {{ill|July 15|en|July 15|qid=Q2686|lt=July 15|1=July 15}} ) – In {{ill|Wakasa Province|en|Wakasa Province|qid=Q1053713|lt=Wakasa Province|1=Wakasa Province}} , at {{ill|Obama, Fukui|en|Obama, Fukui|qid=Q41773|lt=Obama|1=Obama, Fukui}} , a ship dispatched by the Nanban (Southeast Asia) envoy {{ill|Aretsu Shinkyō|ja|亜烈進卿|lt=Aretsu Shinkyō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aretsu Shinkyō|1=aretsushinkei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q65248477}} arrived, marking the first recorded arrival of an {{ill|Elephant|en|Elephant|qid=Q7378|lt=elephant|1=Elephant}} in Japan. * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1716|en|1716|qid=Q6892|lt=1716|1=1716}} {{ill|August 9|en|August 9|qid=Q2782|lt=August 9|1=August 9}} ) – The era was changed from {{ill|Shōtoku (era)|en|Shōtoku (era)|qid=Q1193848|lt=Shōtoku|1=Shōtoku (era)}} to {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} . * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 12th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1841|en|1841|qid=Q7622|lt=1841|1=1841}} {{ill|August 8|en|August 8|qid=Q2780|lt=August 8|1=August 8}} ) – Defying the Tenpō Reforms, the extravagant actor {{ill|Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|en|Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|qid=Q5986166|lt=Ichikawa Danjūrō VII|1=Ichikawa Danjūrō VII}} was exiled from Edo.
== Births == * {{ill|Genkyū|en|Genkyū|qid=Q1194276|lt=Genkyū|1=Genkyū}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1205|en|1205|qid=Q5229|lt=1205|1=1205}} {{ill|July 10|en|July 10|qid=Q2689|lt=July 10|1=July 10}} ) – {{ill|Hōjō Masamura|en|Hōjō Masamura|qid=Q2408959|lt=Hōjō Masamura|1=Hōjō Masamura}} , the 7th shikken (regent) of the Kamakura Shogunate (died {{ill|1273|en|1273|qid=Q5526|lt=1273|1=1273}} ). * {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji|1=Genji era}} 1st Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|July 25|en|July 25|qid=Q2720|lt=July 25|1=July 25}} ) – {{ill|Tanaka Giichi|en|Tanaka Giichi|qid=Q145416|lt=Tanaka Giichi|1=Tanaka Giichi}} , the 26th Prime Minister and an Army General (died {{ill|1929|en|1929|qid=Q18792|lt=1929|1=1929}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|en|Kankō|qid=Q2736722|lt=Kankō|1=Kankō}} 8th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1011|en|1011|qid=Q19238|lt=1011|1=1011}} {{ill|July 25|en|July 25|qid=Q2720|lt=July 25|1=July 25}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Ichijō|en|Emperor Ichijō|qid=Q449540|lt=Ichijō Emperor|1=Emperor Ichijō}} , the 66th Emperor (born {{ill|980|en|980|qid=Q23458|lt=980|1=980}} ). * {{ill|Chōgen|en|Chōgen|qid=Q1193557|lt=Chōgen|1=Chōgen}} 8th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1035|en|1035|qid=Q19325|lt=1035|1=1035}} {{ill|July 29|en|July 29|qid=Q2717|lt=July 29|1=July 29}} ) – {{ill|Princess Senshi|ja|選子内親王|lt=Princess Senshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Princess Senshi|1=Senshi-naishinnō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11642543}} , the tenth daughter of {{ill|Emperor Murakami|en|Emperor Murakami|qid=Q374015|lt=Murakami Emperor|1=Emperor Murakami}} and a poet (born {{ill|964|en|964|qid=Q23951|lt=964|1=964}} ). * {{ill|Genkyū|en|Genkyū|qid=Q1194276|lt=Genkyū|1=Genkyū}} 2nd Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1205|en|1205|qid=Q5229|lt=1205|1=1205}} {{ill|July 10|en|July 10|qid=Q2689|lt=July 10|1=July 10}} ) – {{ill|Hatakeyama Shigetada|en|Hatakeyama Shigetada|qid=Q3128268|lt=Hatakeyama Shigetada|1=Hatakeyama Shigetada}} , a military commander (born {{ill|1164|en|1164|qid=Q19674|lt=1164|1=1164}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1705|en|1705|qid=Q6830|lt=1705|1=1705}} {{ill|August 11|en|August 11|qid=Q2778|lt=August 11|1=August 11}} ) – {{ill|Katsura Shōin|ja|桂昌院|lt=Katsura Shōin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katsura Shōin|1=Keishōin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5369704}} , the biological mother of {{ill|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|ja|Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|lt=Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Tsunayoshi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and a consort of {{ill|Tokugawa Iemitsu|en|Tokugawa Iemitsu|qid=Q314481|lt=Tokugawa Iemitsu|1=Tokugawa Iemitsu}} (born {{ill|1624|en|1624|qid=Q6821|lt=1624|1=1624}} ). * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 6th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1853|en|1853|qid=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}} {{ill|July 27|en|July 27|qid=Q2719|lt=July 27|1=July 27}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|en|Tokugawa Ieyoshi|qid=Q439675|lt=Tokugawa Ieyoshi|1=Tokugawa Ieyoshi}} , the 12th Shogun of the Edo Shogunate (born {{ill|1793|en|1793|qid=Q7807|lt=1793|1=1793}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|21|6|23|5|22|7|6|0622|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 6월 22일]] [[ja:6月22日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:六月廿二]]
[[ar:June 22 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:六月廿二]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:六月廿二]] {{wikidata link|Q839903}} [[Category:Days 22 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar June]] [[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
